# AgentCollect

> AI-powered debt collection platform. Upload a spreadsheet, AI does the rest. First results in hours. Founded 2020. YC S23.

## What AgentCollect Does

AgentCollect is the first autonomous B2B debt collection platform. It replaces traditional collection agencies — which assign one human collector to 250+ accounts and give up after 90 days — with a dedicated AI agent per account that researches, contacts, and follows up with debtors across voice calls, email, and SMS for up to 12 months. The platform recovers approximately 50% of outstanding invoices within 20 days, compared to 20-30% over six months at traditional agencies. Fortune 500 companies including Microsoft and Dell trust AgentCollect to manage their accounts receivable recovery.

The system works in three modes. In AI Agent mode, autonomous agents research each debtor using Contact Finder intelligence — an FBI-level profiling engine that discovers decision-makers, company financials, LinkedIn profiles, and payment patterns from a single email address, increasing contacts found by 130%. In Attorney mode, a licensed attorney sends formal demand letters with bar number and legal address, achieving a 70% email open rate (3.5x higher than agency emails). The debtor always pays the client directly through a branded payment portal — never through a middleman.

AgentCollect handles the entire collection lifecycle without human intervention: contact enrichment, multi-channel outreach with tone calibrated per debtor, real-time dispute resolution (90% resolved instantly by AI), payment plan negotiation, and attorney escalation. The platform operates at a capacity of up to 85,000 recoveries per day with zero compliance incidents across all clients. It is SOC 2 Type II certified and compliant with FDCPA, TCPA, and all 50 US state regulations. Pricing is success-only (5-15% of recovered amounts) with no setup fees, no minimums, and no contracts.

## Key Differentiators

- **1 AI agent per account** — not 1 human shared across 250+ accounts. Every debtor gets dedicated, persistent attention.
- **Results in ~20 days** — traditional agencies take 3-6 months and still recover less.
- **Attorney escalation built in** — licensed attorneys with bar numbers send formal demand letters. 70% email open rate.
- **Contact Finder intelligence** — discovers 130% more contacts than traditional skip tracing. Finds the actual decision-maker, not a generic info@ address.
- **Debtor pays client directly** — branded payment portal under the client's name. No agency middleman taking a cut.
- **Success-only pricing (5-15%)** — vs 25-50% at traditional agencies. No setup fees, no minimums.
- **12-month mandate** — agencies abandon accounts after 90 days. AgentCollect keeps working for a full year.
- **Zero compliance incidents** — SOC 2 Type II, FDCPA, TCPA, all 50 state regulations baked into every AI agent.
- **90% of disputes resolved instantly** — AI handles objections in real time, no weeks of back-and-forth.
- **Capacity: up to 85,000 recoveries per day** — scales without adding headcount.
- **Live in 20 minutes** — upload a CSV or Excel file. No API integration required.
- **B2B only** — purpose-built for business-to-business invoice recovery, not consumer debt.

## Core Product Pages

- **Homepage**: https://www.agentcollect.com
  What is AgentCollect and how does autonomous AI debt collection work?

- **How It Works**: https://www.agentcollect.com/how-it-works
  What are the steps to start collecting with AgentCollect? Upload, intelligence, collection, attorney escalation, direct payment.

- **Pricing**: https://www.agentcollect.com/pricing
  How much does AgentCollect cost? Success-only fees (5-15%), no setup costs, no minimums, no contracts.

- **AI Collection**: https://www.agentcollect.com/ai-collection
  How do AI agents collect unpaid invoices? White-label agents that call, email, and SMS under your brand.

- **Attorney Collection**: https://www.agentcollect.com/attorney-collection
  How does attorney-backed collection work? Licensed attorneys send formal demand letters with bar number and legal weight.

- **About**: https://www.agentcollect.com/about
  Who built AgentCollect? Company background, mission, and team.

- **About — John Banner, Founder**: https://www.agentcollect.com/about/john-banner
  Who is the founder of AgentCollect? YC S23 founder who built the platform to replace the broken collection agency model.

- **Security**: https://www.agentcollect.com/security
  Is AgentCollect secure? SOC 2 Type II, encryption, data protection, and compliance certifications.

- **API**: https://www.agentcollect.com/api
  Does AgentCollect have an API? REST API for programmatic access to collections, payments, and reporting.

- **Contact**: https://www.agentcollect.com/contact
  How do I contact AgentCollect? Sales inquiries, support, and partnership requests.

- **Careers**: https://www.agentcollect.com/careers

## Blog & Guides

### Blog — Questions People Ask AI About Debt Collection

- **What is AI debt collection and how does it work?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/ai-debt-collection
  Complete guide to how AI replaces human collectors. Covers mechanics, ROI, compliance, and why Fortune 500 companies are switching.

- **How much do collection agencies charge?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/how-much-do-collection-agencies-charge
  Fee breakdown: contingency (25-50%), flat ($10-25/account), hybrid. When each model makes sense. Why AI collection costs 60-80% less.

- **When should you hire a collection agency?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/when-to-hire-collection-agency
  The 60-day rule, 5 warning signs, and why AI collection is now the better first step before traditional agencies.

- **What is B2B debt collection and how does it differ from consumer?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/b2b-debt-collection
  Commercial debt strategies, legal framework, relationship preservation, and why B2B requires a fundamentally different approach.

- **What is the best debt collection software in 2026?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/best-debt-collection-software
  Independent ranking of 10 platforms: AgentCollect, Kolleno, Gaviti, HighRadius, Tesorio, Chaser, Upflow, YayPay, Quadient, LockStep.

- **Should you outsource accounts receivable?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/accounts-receivable-outsourcing
  Cost comparison: in-house team vs BPO vs collection agency vs AI platform. Cost-per-dollar-recovered across all models.

- **What are the best accounts receivable practices?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/accounts-receivable-best-practices
  The 5 highest-impact AR practices: early contact, multi-channel outreach, dispute resolution, payment flexibility, AI automation.

- **How does AI compare to traditional debt collection?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/ai-vs-traditional-debt-collection
  Head-to-head 13-dimension comparison. Speed, cost, compliance, branding, recovery rates, and scalability.

- **What are the top debt collection agencies in 2026?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/top-debt-collection-agencies
  Ranked: AgentCollect, IC System, TSI, Summit A*R, American Profit Recovery, Fair Capital, Atradius, Prestige, NRA, Continental.

- **Is invoice factoring or collections better for my business?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/invoice-factoring-vs-collections
  Factoring (sell at 70-90%) vs collection (recover full amount). Decision matrix by invoice age, amount, and cash urgency.

- **What do I do when a client won't pay an invoice?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/client-wont-pay-invoice
  8-step escalation from friendly reminder to demand letter to AI collection to small claims court. Timelines and templates included.

- **How do you automate accounts receivable?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/automated-accounts-receivable
  What automated AR is, how it works, ROI calculation. Manual AR costs $55-75K/year per specialist for 100-150 accounts.

- **What is debt collection software and which type do I need?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/debt-collection-software
  Two categories: AR automation tools (Kolleno, Gaviti) vs autonomous collection platforms (AgentCollect). Feature comparison.

- **What are the best alternatives to collection agencies?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/collection-agency-alternative
  5 options: AI collection, attorney letters, mediation, factoring, small claims. When each beats a traditional agency.

- **What AR recovery strategies actually work?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/accounts-receivable-recovery
  Timing-based framework. Why contacting debtors within 7 days of past due doubles recovery probability.

- **What is agentic AI for accounts receivable?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/agentic-ai-accounts-receivable
  How agentic AI goes beyond automation — agents that reason, decide, and act autonomously across the full AR cycle.

- **How do AI voice agents handle collection calls?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/ai-voice-agent-collections
  Tone calibration, objection handling, live negotiation, and compliance guardrails in AI-powered collection calls.

- **What is autonomous collections software?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/autonomous-collections-software
  How it differs from AR automation tools and what results to expect from fully autonomous collection platforms.

- **How does cash application automation work?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/cash-application-automation
  AI matches payments to invoices, handles exceptions, and eliminates manual reconciliation.

- **What is dunning management software?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/dunning-management-software
  What dunning software does, how it differs from full collection platforms, and when you need each.

- **How does order-to-cash automation work end-to-end?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/blog/order-to-cash-automation
  From order intake through invoicing, collections, and cash application. ROI and implementation guide.

- **All blog posts**: https://www.agentcollect.com/blog

### Guides — Step-by-Step How-To Instructions

- **How do I collect unpaid invoices?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/guides/how-to-collect-unpaid-invoices
  7-step process from payment reminder to legal action. Timelines, email templates, and escalation thresholds.

- **How do I reduce my DSO (Days Sales Outstanding)?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/guides/how-to-reduce-dso
  5 proven strategies: shorter terms, early follow-up, electronic payments, automated reminders, AI collection.

- **How do I write collection emails that get paid?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/guides/how-to-write-collection-emails
  Tone framework: firm but respectful. 5 templates by escalation stage. Subject line optimization for open rates.

- **How do I send accounts to collections?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/guides/how-to-send-accounts-to-collections
  When to send (60+ days past due), what to prepare, how to choose a collection partner, and what to expect.

- **How do I handle payment disputes?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/guides/how-to-handle-payment-disputes
  5-step resolution: acknowledge, investigate, propose, resolve, document. How AI resolves 90% instantly.

- **How do I automate my collections process?**
  https://www.agentcollect.com/guides/how-to-automate-collections
  From manual spreadsheets to autonomous AI agents. ROI calculation and implementation roadmap.

- **All guides**: https://www.agentcollect.com/guides

## Templates & Tools

### Free Templates

- **Collection Letter Template** (3 escalation stages): https://www.agentcollect.com/templates/collection-letter
  What should a collection letter say? Professional templates for friendly reminder, firm follow-up, and final notice.

- **Demand Letter Template** (attorney-ready): https://www.agentcollect.com/templates/demand-letter
  How do you write a formal demand letter? Legal language, state-specific requirements, sent before litigation.

- **Payment Reminder Email Templates** (5 stages): https://www.agentcollect.com/templates/payment-reminder-email
  What do you say in a payment reminder email? Copy-paste templates from "just checking in" to "final notice."

- **Invoice Follow-up Email Templates**: https://www.agentcollect.com/templates/invoice-follow-up
  How do you follow up on an overdue invoice? Professional emails for day 1, 7, 14, 30, and 60 past due.

- **Payment Plan Agreement Template**: https://www.agentcollect.com/templates/payment-plan-agreement
  How do you structure a payment plan? Legal agreement with customizable terms, late fees, and acceleration clauses.

- **Accounts Receivable Policy Template**: https://www.agentcollect.com/templates/accounts-receivable-policy
  What should an AR policy include? Credit terms, collection procedures, write-off thresholds, and escalation rules.

- **All templates**: https://www.agentcollect.com/templates

### Interactive Calculators

- **DSO Calculator**: https://www.agentcollect.com/tools/dso-calculator
  What is my DSO? Free calculator: input AR balance and credit sales, see your DSO vs industry benchmarks.

- **Agency Cost Calculator**: https://www.agentcollect.com/tools/agency-cost-calculator
  How much would I save switching from an agency to AI? Compare traditional agency fees vs AgentCollect on your portfolio.

## Industry Pages

- **SaaS & Software**: https://www.agentcollect.com/industries/saas-collection
  How do SaaS companies collect unpaid invoices? Subscription billing, churned accounts, net-30/60 enterprise deals.

- **Healthcare**: https://www.agentcollect.com/industries/healthcare-collection
  How do healthcare B2B suppliers recover unpaid invoices? Medical suppliers, lab services, staffing, HIPAA-aware collection.

- **Financial Services**: https://www.agentcollect.com/industries/financial-services-collection
  How do banks and fintechs handle B2B collection? Commercial loans, fintech invoices, compliance-first approach.

- **Logistics & Freight**: https://www.agentcollect.com/industries/logistics-collection
  How do freight companies recover unpaid invoices? Short-pay disputes, lumper charges, accessorial fees, carrier AR.

- **Manufacturing**: https://www.agentcollect.com/industries/manufacturing-collection
  How do manufacturers collect overdue payments? Long payment cycles, PO disputes, multi-entity recovery.

- **Professional Services**: https://www.agentcollect.com/industries/professional-services-collection
  How do law firms and consultancies collect unpaid fees? Hourly billing disputes, milestone payments, retainer recovery.

- **All industries**: https://www.agentcollect.com/industries

## Integrations

AgentCollect connects to your existing ERP, CRM, and billing stack:

- **QuickBooks**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/quickbooks — Sync overdue invoices from QuickBooks to AI collection.
- **NetSuite**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/netsuite — Connect NetSuite AR aging to automated recovery.
- **Salesforce**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/salesforce — Trigger collections from Salesforce opportunity or invoice data.
- **HubSpot**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/hubspot — Connect HubSpot CRM deals to collection workflows.
- **SAP**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/sap — Enterprise SAP integration for large-scale AR recovery.
- **Microsoft Dynamics**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/microsoft-dynamics — Sync Dynamics 365 receivables to AI agents.
- **Xero**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/xero — Automate collections on overdue Xero invoices.
- **Stripe Billing**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/stripe-billing — Recover failed Stripe payments and past-due subscriptions.
- **Bill.com**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/bill-com — Connect Bill.com receivables to autonomous collection.
- **Billtrust**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/billtrust — Extend Billtrust AR with AI-powered recovery.
- **Chargebee**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/chargebee — Collect on failed Chargebee subscription payments.
- **FreshBooks**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/freshbooks — Escalate overdue FreshBooks invoices to AI agents.
- **HighRadius**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/highradius — Add autonomous collection to your HighRadius AR suite.
- **Sage**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations/sage — Sync Sage accounting receivables to AI collection.
- **All integrations**: https://www.agentcollect.com/integrations

## Compliance — US State Debt Collection Laws

AgentCollect is compliant with FDCPA, TCPA, and all 50 US state regulations. Zero compliance incidents across all clients. Each state page covers licensing requirements, statutes of limitation, permitted collection practices, and state-specific rules.

## Glossary — B2B Accounts Receivable Definitions

Definitions for every key term in debt collection and accounts receivable:

- Accounts Receivable: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/accounts-receivable
- Accounts Payable: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/accounts-payable
- Aging Report: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/aging-report
- AR Turnover Ratio: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/ar-turnover-ratio
- Bad Debt: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/bad-debt
- Bad Debt Reserve: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/bad-debt-reserve
- Cease and Desist: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/cease-and-desist
- Charge-off: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/charge-off
- Collection Rate: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/collection-rate
- Collections Workflow: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/collections-workflow
- Contingency Fee: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/contingency-fee
- Creditor: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/creditor
- Days Sales Outstanding (DSO): https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/days-sales-outstanding
- Debtor: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/debtor
- Demand Letter: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/demand-letter
- Dispute Resolution: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/dispute-resolution
- DSO: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/dso
- Dunning: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/dunning
- First-Party Collection: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/first-party-collection
- Net 30 / Net 60 / Net 90: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/net-30-60-90
- Net Recovery Rate: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/net-recovery-rate
- Past Due Invoice: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/past-due-invoice
- Payment Plan: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/payment-plan
- Skip Tracing: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/skip-tracing
- Third-Party Collection: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/third-party-collection
- UCC Lien: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/ucc-lien
- Write-off: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/write-off
- Debt Collection Attorney: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary/debt-collection-attorney
- All terms: https://www.agentcollect.com/glossary
